programme.title: L'actu 360 : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un tour complet de l'actualité du jour, qui présente les faits essentiels en France et dans le monde. programme.title: E3 - Cutlass Convertible Repair
programme.desc: Most convertible tops from the late 60's, early 70's have problems. The AGG crew will show you how to replace and rebuild your convertible from top to bottom.

programme.desc: Do you fix your problem engine, or throw in a new one? Today the answer is a 355 Crate engine for a 33 Ford Roadster.

programme.desc: Zack and Ari live in California, but for lots of people winter is a very real thing. The duo explore ways of cold-proofing bikes.

programme.desc: Inside Bingo's dream, Bingo and Floppy have an intergalactic adventure, while the rest of her sleep-deprived family try to navigate Bingo's non-stop night-time bedhopping.

programme.title: E41 - Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: E50 - The Key Badge
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error.

programme.title: E49 - The Sailing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick.

programme.title: E48 - The Tour Guide Badge
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.title: E8 - Solar Race: Australia
programme.desc: Glitch hopes to win a solar-powered race across the Australian outback.

programme.title: E10 - Recital
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: E20 - I Like Fairies
programme.desc: Unicorns, dragons, mermen, and the tooth fairy! The little animals share their favourite magical creatures.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E24 - The Taste Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is making a smoothie. The Squirrels can't agree on whether they like it or not!

programme.title: E19 - Fig
programme.desc: It's the nicest, kindest, Fig, performing his song, 'Just Can't Help Being Sweet!'

programme.title: E23 - Kite Plight
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her.

programme.title: E24 - Crafty Pea
programme.desc: Evil Pea makes a monster costume in the craft aisle to scare the Tato Team out of the supermarket, but Supertato wants to be the monster's friend.

programme.title: E13 - 三大特色大賽爆笑來襲
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E4 - 新官上任 常華森代旭變rapper？
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E10 - 林依晨鄭元暢再合體
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E5 - 吳尊何超蓮最強廚藝代表之爭
programme.desc: 由李晨、吳尊、何超蓮、劉維作常駐嘉賓，帶領觀眾走進阿根廷、新西蘭、泰國、冰島、土耳其、愛爾蘭等國家駐華大使館，探秘各地文化密碼，復刻地道異國風味，並結合中國特色美食文化打造中外融合料理，開啟以食會友、賓至如歸的文化交流真人秀。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E6 - 霸總用爆燈搶心儀求職者
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E6 - 霸總用爆燈搶心儀求職者
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E4 - 新官上任 常華森代旭變rapper？
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E6 - 霸總用爆燈搶心儀求職者
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: Ninja Art Of Heart, Popomaru!
programme.desc: A fun ninja drama where parents and children can explore emotional growth together! The story follows Shinobi, an elementary school ninja, as she teams up with Popomaru -- the playful spirit of emotions -- to learn a creative way of understanding feelings and building positive relationships with those around her. Join her on an exciting journey to discover how to handle emotions with skill and joy!

programme.title: E5 - Dugongs
programme.desc: In Moreton Bay, Dr Ann gets in the water with a dugong as part of the world's largest dugong health check. A critical mission to help save the species globally. She learns that many dugong secrets can be found in their poo!

programme.title: E3 - Alligator & Yaupon Tea
programme.desc: Daniel heads out on a South Carolina gator hunt and then learns about an ancient American caffeine crop called Yaupon being rediscovered in Georgia.

programme.title: E4 - Lake Whitefish & Wild Salad
programme.desc: Daniel and Arthur angle for lake white fish with their wives Avani and Sara, and gather wild salad ingredients on a remote lake in Maine.

programme.title: E3 - Kamilaroi Highway (Part 2)
programme.desc: Part Two of our Kamilaroi Highway road-trip starts in Lightning Ridge and wraps up in Bourke, and we’re blessed with more sensational countryside, and the awesome stories that make this area of Australia so popular. This is a part of Australia everyone needs to discover.

programme.title: E4 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E3 - Alligator & Yaupon Tea
programme.desc: Daniel heads out on a South Carolina gator hunt and then learns about an ancient American caffeine crop called Yaupon being rediscovered in Georgia.

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam
programme.desc: Off to Vietnam next, Rooftop and Catfish embark on what may be their most dangerous visit yet. The BMX bikers start their journey relatively tame with a shot of snake blood. However, things quickly escalate from there with the most intense game of frogger they’ve ever played in the Vietnamese streets. programme.title: 6H Info:2025-2026
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: E23 - And What Do You Think?
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: E29 - Here's A Tortoise
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: E1828
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E10 - The Very Best In Design
programme.desc: In Boulogne-Billancourt, visit the Musee des Annees 30. Stefania Di Petrillo explores the emotional dimensions of design. Artistic director Pieter Mulier is following in the footsteps of the founder of the Alaia fashion house: sophistication at its best. The organic forms of an omnipresent nature are embodied in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goleo.

programme.title: E1828
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: E10 - The Very Best In Design
programme.desc: In Boulogne-Billancourt, visit the Musee des Annees 30. Stefania Di Petrillo explores the emotional dimensions of design. The organic forms of an omnipresent nature are embodied in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goleo.

programme.title: 6H Info:2025-2026
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: E24 - The Stone River
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Echappees Belles S19
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E311 - Treasure Ship / Sleepover On Sparkle Island
programme.desc: Bobbi mistook Sir Steel's sparkly anchor for a treasure. Sir Steel's Jelly Surprise then spilled into the waters! // Adventure Alex takes Deer Squad and the twins to camp and search for the mysterious Grax Turtle on Sparkle Island.

programme.title: E207 - Don't Go Grandma
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World.

programme.title: E314 - Princess Peppa
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig. Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: E101 - Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E308 - Tow Truck Tough!

programme.title: E1 - Hooked & Booked
programme.desc: A career criminal and first-time arrestee bond in custody; an expecting father faces the prospect of missing his child's birth, and a 20-year-old aspiring model gets a taste of the inside of a jail cell.

programme.title: E5 - Search On The Bayou
programme.desc: Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.

programme.title: E6 - Digital Grudge
programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life. As Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorising the city.

programme.title: E13 - DUI Bride
programme.desc: A man hurls furniture onto a busy NYC street from atop a skyscraper; a self-proclaimed bride is arrested for DUI on her supposed wedding day, and more!

programme.title: E392 - Pickin' Wall-To-Wall
programme.desc: Mike meets a Connecticut picker with major inventory-but getting access to his collection means dismantling a massive wall. Meanwhile, Robbie and Jersey comb through a collector's old-timey general store.

programme.title: E4 - Bohol In One
programme.desc: In the majestic island of Bohol, Jaime sharpens her blacksmithing skills, follows in the steps of a resolute underground revolutionary, and learns a dying language crafted from human body parts.

programme.title: E19 - Odd Dwellings
programme.desc: From calling Veteran's Stadium home to setting up camp in an airport terminal to turning a dumpster into a luxurious abode. Each of these dwellings is so beyond odd that they are truly unbelievable.

programme.title: E392 - Pickin' Wall-To-Wall
programme.desc: Mike meets a Connecticut picker with major inventory-but getting access to his collection means dismantling a massive wall. Meanwhile, Robbie and Jersey comb through a collector's old-timey general store.

programme.title: E392 - Pickin' Wall-To-Wall
programme.desc: Mike meets a Connecticut picker with major inventory-but getting access to his collection means dismantling a massive wall. Meanwhile, Robbie and Jersey comb through a collector's old-timey general store.

programme.title: E1 - The Birth Of Mickey
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: E3 - Barbarossa
programme.desc: Operation Barbarossa, Nazi Germany's surprise invasion of the Soviet Union, launches on June 22, 1941. In what is the largest military operation in history, Hitler aims to capture their economic resources.

programme.title: E3 - Into The Magnetic Storm
programme.desc: The team seeks out the wreck of the Revonoc, a racing yacht that vanished in 1958 with a crew of five. A freak magnetic anomaly was detected in the Triangle when she went missing.

programme.title: E3 - Pig Head
programme.desc: Ronnie faces a challenge in his own territory. Joey and Zak use pig heads to lure in giants. Leron and Porkchop battle a poacher stealing their catch. Troy places a big bet on Spearhead Lake.

programme.title: E8 - Curse Of Graveyard Island
programme.desc: As gator season approaches the halfway point, Troy and Pickle hunt a haunted honeyhole with a checkered past. Bruce searches for the monster threatening a local swimming hole.

programme.title: E15 - Sinking In
programme.desc: As the team moves closer to retrieving what they believe to be the Chappell Vault, a dangerous event occurs in the Money Pit and the Fellowship must adjust their plans quickly to avoid disaster.

programme.title: E6 - Mind Games
programme.desc: From the CIA's decades-long pursuit of the perfect truth serum to the U.S. Army's secret PsyOps in Vietnam, mind games have long been at play among countries, its enemies, and even its own citizens.

programme.title: E3 - The North Slope
programme.desc: Lauro travels north of the Arctic Circle with his team of sled dogs to hunt caribou; Daniel rebuilds an old floating cabin using driftwood logs and the power of tides.

programme.title: E8 - Curse Of Graveyard Island
programme.desc: As gator season approaches the halfway point, Troy and Pickle hunt a haunted honeyhole with a checkered past. Bruce searches for the monster threatening a local swimming hole.

programme.title: E15 - Sinking In
programme.desc: As the team moves closer to retrieving what they believe to be the Chappell Vault, a dangerous event occurs in the Money Pit and the Fellowship must adjust their plans quickly to avoid disaster.

programme.title: E3 - Barbarossa
programme.desc: Operation Barbarossa, Nazi Germany's surprise invasion of the Soviet Union, launches on June 22, 1941. In what is the largest military operation in history, Hitler aims to capture their economic resources.

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E3 - Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Being little can be tough, but Baby John is growing up! First, he thinks he's ready to be big & make all his own decisions, but Mom & Dad help him understand that being little is pretty awesome, too! Then, Mom helps Baby John learn how to express all his different emotions & feelings, from grumpy to happy to proud. When Baby John loses his pacifier, the whole family joins in to help him on the big search!

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!

Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E303 - Star-Robics / Who's the Dummy Now?
programme.desc: In this fitness variety show, Patrick learns how to exercise. // A family of dummies move into the Star home.

programme.title: E710 - Music to My Fears
programme.desc: Luna and the Moon Goats have to find a replacement guitarist for the band when Luna injures her hands from playing.

programme.title: E206 - Cruel Summer
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.

programme.title: E218 - Bring It On
programme.desc: Trying out for the cheerleading squad, Lay Lay and Sadie add their own twists to the routine, but learn that standing out doesn't always work when trying to fit into a team.

programme.title: E1001 - Summer Camp: The Grate Outdoors / Summer Camp: Don't Lose Your Cool
programme.desc: At Camp Mastodon, Lynn pushes an overly-cautious Lisa to become more adventurous. // When Lori learns her Camp Mastodon campers think she's uncool, she tries to impress them by breaking the rules.

programme.title: E302 - Bookworm / The Cookie Test
programme.desc: Booky the Bookworm arrives at the library to read the kids a story, but Phil loses his pet worm Todd Jr. in the excitement. // Angelica tries to teach Chuckie and Kimi how to speak up for what they want, since they're going to be living together.

programme.title: E305 - Driven to Drive / A Patty in Time
programme.desc: In a Patrick Show episode about boats, Cecil teaches Patrick how to drive. // Patrick time-travels in a race for the Krusty Krab's newest menu item.

programme.title: E1005 - One False Move / Personal Train Wreck
programme.desc: The Loud kids and their cousins come up with a plan to convince Lance and Sharon to move their family to Royal Woods. // When Lynn gets the opportunity to be a trainer at her uncle's gym, she struggles to motivate her out of shape clients.

programme.title: E208 - Dubu / Jack's Day Off
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam! // Jack volunteers to run the Groom & Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: It’s spring: the season of courtship and new life. Witness nature awaken from its slumber in many forms, from the blossoms that explode in the rain-soaked desert of Arizona to the fuzzy wood ducklings that leap from their nests.

programme.desc: It’s spring: the season of courtship and new life. Witness nature awaken from its slumber in many forms, from the blossoms that explode in the rain-soaked desert of Arizona to the fuzzy wood ducklings that leap from their nests.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E1 - Smell
programme.desc: The first sense to evolve in the first animals was chemoreception: being able to detect chemicals in the animal’s environment. This helps animals find prey and mates, and to sense predators from a distance.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: E1 - January-February - the Year Begins
programme.desc: In the early months of the year, the Earth’s axial tilt brings the height of summer in some places and the depths of winter in others. See how life struggles to survive under these extreme conditions.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E2 - Summer
programme.desc: Summer brings long, warm days for wildlife to thrive. Watch animals learn new skills, compete for mates, and escape predators as they try to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: E2 - Sanctuary of the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: On Africa's east coast, the warm Agulhas run south with a distinctive subtropical landscape. Made up of everything from mangrove swamps to colorful coral reefs, the area has marine turtles - who breed on long and warm sandy beaches - and a recently found population of 'living fossils', the Coelacanth, which dwell in deep, submarine canyons.

programme.title: Kurumi Shiromori: The Ballerina's Av Debut
Kurumi Shiromori: The Ballerina's Av Debut
Kurumi Shiromori: The Ballerina's Av Debut
The Movie Emperor
programme.desc: The Hong Kong movie star Lau Wai-chi misses out again on the Hong Kong film awards. He sits in his office, making short videos that pay tribute to the characters he has played over his forty-year career. But trying to regain popularity this way feels desperate and cheap. He needs to make a film again. He contacts Chinese director Lin Hao, as he wants to star in a film shot in the countryside, playing an ordinary farmer, something he has never done before. This film he thinks will help restore his career to glory. Yet he is so used to being a movie star and having a special treatment in his everyday life, that it is hard for him to connect with the people of the street or peasants, people who have a lower social status than him. Even with women, there seems to exist an impassable barrier. For his new role to be successful, he needs to learn from the villagers how they really live and speak. But they see through his arrogance and vanity – as does the crew. The big star is nobod

programme.title: Love The Way You Are
programme.desc: It's a romantic comedy between the next door neighbors Lin-lin Chou and Yu-ke Fang, who have totally opposite school performances. While Lin-lin struggles to pass the exams, Yu-ke gets the highest score in every of them. Just when Lin-lin supposes she is finally going to say good-bye to Yu-ke after high school graduation, they get accepted by the same department – department of animal husbandry, the most unpopular department of the most popular university. To fix Yu-ke's “First love trauma” she accidentally caused, Lin-lin tries everything to help him chase back his first love, the queen bee of the school. However, Lin-lin herself also gradually falls for Yu-ke during the process. What should Lin-lin do with her feelings? What is actually going on in Yu-ke's mind? The graduation season is around the corner, this is a story for you to call back your first love memory.

programme.title: Madalena
programme.desc: Early spring in the city of Macau. Mada (Louis Cheung), a divorced man in his 40's, is the strong and silent type. He lives in a dilapidated flat that's set for demolition. Suffering from a serious case of amnesia, Mada works the graveyard shift as a taxi driver to overcome the pain of his affliction. One night, Mada picks up Lena (Chrissie Chau), who works as a restaurant receptionist by day and a bar hostess by night. After a misunderstanding sparks spark their friendship, Mada becomes Lena's driver, picking her up before and after work. Lena's arrival finally brings some color into Mada's life; he even begins to think that he can finally move on from his divorce. Yet, Lena feels lonely in Macau; she's disliked by her colleagues, who all think that she is a ruthless, money-grubbing hustler for using her voluptuous figure to get special treatment. Lena knows Mada's feelings for her, but she, too, is hiding a past that she can't get over...

programme.title: The Shadowless Tower
programme.desc: Gu Wentong, a middle-aged food critic, is drifting through the local eateries of vibrant Beijing with his younger photographer colleague Oyang. A divorce with a 6-year-old daughter and estranged from his father for decades, he is looking for a new perspective on life while reconsidering his failings as a father, a son, and a lover. While the seasons come and go, people get together and move apart. Only one thing will remain the same: The White Pagoda where they all meet sooner or later...

programme.title: Initial D
programme.desc: Takumi delivers tofu in father's old Toyota every day and unwittingly acquires difting skills. An unexpected victory awakens his competitive genes, leading him to fierce races.

programme.title: E7 - Born To Be Mild
programme.desc: After Rodney is accidentally left behind while the Johnson's are on vacation, he goes to bunk with Leon in the wild.

programme.title: E3 - Tamir's Art Show
programme.desc: Tamir is disappointed when Grandma Nell shows off a drawing he made for Chris before it was finished.

programme.title: E7 - Tree Hugger
programme.desc: Lumpus and Lazlo butt heads when they both try to catch the elusive 'Migrating Mullberry' tree, which only visits this region once every 100 years.

programme.title: E8 - Marshmallow Jones
programme.desc: Lazlo's friendship with Raj suffers because Raj has only one thing on his mind: marshmallows!

programme.title: E9 - Gone Fishin' (Sort Of)
programme.desc: Scoutmaster Lumpus is determined to finally catch a fish, and he certainly doesn't need the Jelly Beans to help him reel one in. Or does he?

programme.title: E5 - The Spiffanos
programme.desc: After Adam borrows a pencil from Phinneas Porpoise, he finds himself indebted to the Spiffies. To pay back the debt, Adam agrees to make a secret 'delivery', but Jake tags along, and things quickly go south.

programme.title: E3 - The Titan Games Trials 3
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

E21
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E21

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E10 - A Sea Of Silk/Tending The Earth
programme.desc: Chiara Vigo is one of the world's last remaining sea silk weavers, master of a little-known but centuries-old art, and one in danger of extinction. Becoming a farmer at almost 40 is not so easy. But that's what Laura Moser did when she took over her parents' farm.

programme.title: E107
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: Malaysian NSL '26 E1 -Terengganu Marvels v Perak Phoe
E42
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E6 - Wind Down Weekends

programme.title: E1

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: It is a dream come true for engineer Bill Cheung when a quiet villa in the countryside is assigned to him as staff quarters. As soon as he moves into this extravagant estate with his wife and 2 daughters, strange things begin to happen. When his daughter Jane discovers the previous owners were burned to death many years ago, Bill's family is already on their way to a similar tragic demise...

programme.title: Aces Go Places
programme.desc: The Mafia is concluding a secret deal in Hong Kong when the loot to be handed over, a consignment of valuable diamonds, is stolen by someone who left a white glove. Based on this clue, the police thinks that it is the work of the infamous international thief 'White Glove'. Interpol is contacted and an ace detective, Baldy, is sent from New York to investigate. He is assisted by a local woman inspector known for her toughness. They start on a wrong footing initially but grow to be very fond of one another...

programme.title: Will Of Iron
programme.desc: Maggie returns to Hong Kong to bring her grandmother back for settlement in Canada. Only her fiance Michael comes to welcome her back, but Jacky and Carol, her good friends and married couple, fail to appear. Jacky Chan, a cartoonist, is in fact a long-time cocaine doper and is therefore deeply in debts. Sam, one of the hired thugs of the drug-dealer constantly comes to collect debts. It greatly irritates Carol. Michael goes so far as to collaborate with the drug dealer for benefits. Moreover, he supplies cocaine to Jacky once in a while. Jacky is under the delusion that cocaine inhalation will help him gain inspiration in cartoon-drawing, but contrarily, cocaine only makes him get into real trouble. He resorts to satisfy his urge for drugs by snatching his wife's money and accidentally hurts her. Carol ultimately tells the whole story in tears to Maggie...

programme.title: My Dad Is A Jerk
programme.desc: Lee Lap Cheong is an immature, irresponsible and gutless guy who does not know how to say 'Sorry' and 'Thank you', a good-for-nothing who has completely given away his pride. When Cheong was still young, he married Yip Ting, who then bore him a son. As Ting grew older, she changed her outlook on life and realized that Cheong's love was not as important as financial security. She divorced Cheong and immigrated to Canada with their son Jason to start a new life...

She divorced Cheong and immigrated to Canada with their son Jason to start a new life...

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.desc: A daily celebration of the Liturgy of the Lord with Fr. Tito Caluag. Join us as we reflect on the goodness of God in this healing mass.

programme.desc: Morning Newscast

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.
